evidence: "I enjoy British mysteries and many detective stories."
"I enjoy period stories and excellent character development which this movie displays."
"I appreciate all the character development of the supporting characters. This really enhances the plot."
"The characters were well developed and I enjoyed the interaction between the two leading detectives."
"I enjoy seeing cities which haven't been showcased very often."
"A nice way to spend an evening."
"The actors were excellent and Patrick Malihide is one of my favorites."
"Young Catherine was well written, beautifully acted as well as wonderful costumes and scenery."
"I always enjoy Peter Davison and Brian Glover."
"Patrick Malihide is one of my favorites."
"I especially enjoy buildings, cars, etc. that are no longer here."
"I will watch this series again. British history is fascinating."
"It is a classic and will endure as one of the best."

summary: The user has a strong preference for detective and period dramas, appreciating character development and high production quality. They enjoy slower-paced narratives that evoke emotional resonance and provide a visual treat.
